bug.description: scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority

prompt:
There is a scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority downstream of function get_phich_resource_times6 in the openair2/LAYER2/MAC subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/MAC/eNB_scheduler_primitives.c:168.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
